states.name: open
states.initial: defaultOpen or controlled open; otherwise false

aria: closed trigger is button with aria-haspopup=dialog and aria-expanded=false
content uses Base UI popup/dialog semantics
title and description provide generated associations

transitions.action: Close activation, Escape, or accepted outside interaction
transitions.effect: request close and restore trigger focus
emit onOpenChange while supplied open prop remains authoritative

unknowns.reason: Portal positioning, outside interaction, dismissal ordering, ARIA association, and focus restoration require the pending shared browser adapter.
Controlled open callback semantics are a required browser vector and are not fabricated from SSR.
Collision fallback order, arrow placement, available-size variables, RTL, zoom, viewport edges, virtual anchors, and fixed versus absolute coordinates need direct browser observation.
Exact outside pointer/focus phase, preventDefault behavior, nested layers, initial-focus policy, Tab behavior, and restoration ordering are delegated to Base UI.
Custom/provider/body container precedence is declared; SSR open markup, portal relocation, generated ID stability, warnings, and node preservation remain unexecuted.
Base UI may flip the requested side at viewport boundaries; this Chrome fixture observes bottom when top collides.
